title: InfrastructureRunnerConfig
description: Runtime configuration generated by the platform operator for a Conductor agent deployment. Owned by seam-core; platform operator authors RunnerConfig CRs exclusively (INV-009). Conductor agent reads RunnerConfig to discover its phases, steps, and operational parameters. Namespace: ont-system on the target cluster. conductor-schema.md.

spec.description: InfrastructureRunnerConfig specification. Operator-generated at runtime; never human-authored (INV-009).

clusterRef.description: Name of the TalosCluster this RunnerConfig is authoritative for.

runnerImage.description: Fully qualified container image reference for the Conductor agent. Format: registry/image:tag. Tag convention: v{talosVersion}-r{revision} stable, dev/dev-rc{N} development. INV-011.

phases.description: Ordered list of operational phases for this cluster's Conductor lifecycle.

name.description: Phase name. Must be unique within the RunnerConfig.

parameters.description: Phase-specific parameters passed to capabilities executing within this phase.

steps.description: Ordered list of execution steps across all phases.

name.description: Step identifier. Must be unique within the RunnerConfig.

capability.description: Named Conductor capability to invoke for this step (e.g., pack-deploy, talos-upgrade).

parameters.description: Step-specific parameters forwarded to the capability at runtime.

dependsOn.description: Names of steps that must complete before this step may begin.

haltOnFailure.description: When true, a failure in this step halts the entire RunnerConfig execution. When false, subsequent steps that do not depend on this step may still proceed.

operationalHistory.description: Append-only record of completed RunnerConfig executions for this cluster. Written by the Conductor agent.

maintenanceTargetNodes.description: Node names selected for maintenance operations in the current RunnerConfig generation.

operatorLeaderNode.description: Node name of the elected operator leader for this cluster.

selfOperation.description: When true, this RunnerConfig governs an operation on the management cluster itself (e.g., management cluster upgrade).

status.description: Runtime status. Written exclusively by the Conductor agent leader (CR-INV-006).

capabilities.description: Self-declared capability manifest emitted by the Conductor agent on startup. Operators must never hardcode capability availability assumptions (CR-INV-005).

version.description: Capability version declared by the agent.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this capability does.

parameterSchema.description: Schema describing the parameters accepted by this capability.

agentVersion.description: Version string of the Conductor agent binary currently running. Self-reported on startup.

agentLeader.description: Pod name of the current Conductor agent leader. Written by the leader on election win. Cleared on leader departure.

phase.description: Terminal execution phase written by Conductor execute mode. Completed: all steps succeeded. Failed: at least one step failed. Absent while in progress. Platform operators watch this field to detect terminal conditions. conductor-schema.md §17.

failedStep.description: Name of the first step that reached the Failed phase. Present only when phase=Failed. conductor-schema.md §17.

stepResults.description: Results of the most recent step executions in the current RunnerConfig generation.

name.description: Step name matching a spec.steps entry.

status.description: Terminal status of this step execution.

message.description: Additional context about the step outcome.

conditions.description: Standard Kubernetes condition list for this RunnerConfig.
